title: GearMC
description: Designed for simplicity and enjoyment, it brings together mods while keeping the core gameplay.
body: ![GearMC Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/948c161dba5d8d5ec1a019d198492c27c53156ef_0.webp) # GearMC provides you a smooth Minecraft experience with this carefully curated modpack. Designed for simplicity and enjoyment for a quality-of-life experience while keeping the core gameplay. Explore a visually enhanced world, adding a touch of life to your Minecraft characters and mobs. Streamline your mining and resource-gathering adventures making tedious tasks a thing of the past. This modpack is ✨ perfect ✨ for players who want a lightweight yet enriched Minecraft experience without overwhelming changes. Whether you're a builder, adventurer, or casual player, this modpack delivers 📦.
